title: Acacia to Cherry Conversion
description: Changes the texture of acacia to become cherry, and jungle to become bamboo.
body:
Changes the texture of acacia to become cherry, and jungle to become bamboo. It's as simple as that.
Perfect for people playing in 1.19 who want to use 1.20 wood, for whatever reason. Lapis Blocks are Bamboo Mosaics, since I couldn't find a better placeholder block.

Also works in 1.20 I guess
